title: S + V + N + which/that + S + V（受格省略）

formulas.formula: N + which/that + S + V (受格關係代名詞作受詞)
formulas.zh: 名詞 + 關係代名詞 + 主詞 + 動詞...（關係代名詞作受詞時可省略）

formulas.formula: N + (which/that) + S + V (省略受格關係代名詞)
formulas.zh: 名詞 + 省略關係代名詞 + 主詞 + 動詞...（受詞位置省略仍可理解）

explanation: 受格關係代名詞（which/that）在關係子句中作受詞時，可以省略。省略後主詞和動詞仍然存在，句子結構完整。例如「The book which/that I read」可簡化為「The book I read」。但若關係代名詞作主詞時絕不可省略，例如「The book which is on the table」不能省略which。這是高中英文的重要區別點，常見於學測題目。

examples.eng: The movie (that) we watched last weekend was very exciting.
examples.chi: 我們上週末看的那部電影非常令人興奮。

examples.eng: All the students (whom) the teacher praised have made great progress.
examples.chi: 所有被老師表揚的學生都取得了很大的進步。

examples.eng: The technology (which) scientists developed has changed our lives.
examples.chi: 科學家開發的這項技術改變了我們的生活。

examples.eng: This is the method (that) experts recommend for solving the problem.
examples.chi: 這是專家推薦用來解決問題的方法。

extension.tip: 判斷關係代名詞能否省略的關鍵：檢查關係代名詞在子句中的角色。若是受詞可省略；若是主詞（後面直接跟動詞）則不可省略。省略後應仍能清楚看出主詞和動詞。

examples.test: The book which is on the table（which作主詞）
examples.result: → 不能省略，✗ The book is on the table（意思改變）

examples.test: The book which I read（which作受詞）
examples.result: → 可以省略，✓ The book I read（意思相同）

examples.test: The person whom we met（whom作受詞）
examples.result: → 可以省略，✓ The person we met（受詞位置被省略）

extension.note: 受詞可省，主詞不可省；若關係代名詞後直接有主詞和動詞，則此代名詞作受詞，可省略。

parts: the museum owns is worth millions of dollars.
exercises.sentence: The painting (that/which) the museum owns is worth millions of dollars.
exercises.translation: 博物館擁有的這幅畫價值數百萬美元。

parts: you submitted have been reviewed by the manager.
exercises.sentence: All the documents (that/which) you submitted have been reviewed by the manager.
exercises.translation: 你提交的所有文件都已被經理審查。

parts: they gained from the project was invaluable.
exercises.sentence: The experience (that/which) they gained from the project was invaluable.
exercises.translation: 他們從這個專案中獲得的經驗是無價的。

parts: the company implemented has proven very effective.
exercises.sentence: The strategy (that/which) the company implemented has proven very effective.
exercises.translation: 公司實施的這項策略已被證明非常有效。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 選擇正確的關係代名詞用法，完成句子
mc_exercises.question_eng: The book _______ I borrowed from the library is very interesting.
mc_exercises.explanation: 受格關係代名詞（which/that）在關係子句作受詞時可以省略。此句中 borrowed 的受詞是關係代名詞，故可省略，直接寫 "The book I borrowed" 即可。A、B、C 皆為具體代名詞，但此題正確答案是省略形式。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 判斷關係代名詞省略的正確性
mc_exercises.question_eng: The students _______ the teacher assigned homework to are complaining about the workload.
mc_exercises.explanation: "assign homework to" 中，to 是介詞，受詞為關係代名詞。此時關係代名詞在受格位置作受詞，可以省略，句子改為 "The students the teacher assigned homework to are complaining..."。A 和 B 雖為受格形式，但題目要求選擇省略形式。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 辨別受格與主格關係代名詞的差異
mc_exercises.question_eng: The scientist _______ discovered this new element came from Germany, while the research _______ he conducted was funded by the government.
mc_exercises.explanation: 第一空：discovered 的主詞是關係代名詞（主格），不可省略，用 who。第二空：conducted 的受詞是關係代名詞（受格），可以省略，用 that 或省略。B 錯誤，第一空不可省略；C、D 對主格代名詞的判斷有誤。

mc_exercises.question_chi: 複雜句型：判斷多個子句中的代名詞用法
mc_exercises.question_eng: The proposal _______ the committee discussed and _______ finally approved has significantly improved the company's efficiency, despite the criticism _______ some board members raised.

options.text: that可省略; which; which可省略
which可省略; that; which可省略

mc_exercises.explanation: 第一空：discussed 的受詞是關係代名詞（受格），可省略，用 that。第二空：approved 的主詞是關係代名詞（主格），不可省略，用 which。第三空：raised 的受詞是關係代名詞（受格），可省略，用 which。B、C、D 都有主客顛倒或省略判斷錯誤的問題。

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 這是我昨天買的那本書。
translation_exercises.answer: This is the book I bought yesterday.
key_points: I bought（受格省略的關係子句）
hints: 句型框架：N + (which/that) + S + V，其中受格關係代名詞被省略
注意：主詞I和動詞bought都要保留，只省略受詞的which/that

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 老師指派給我們的那份功課很困難。
translation_exercises.answer: The homework our teacher assigned us was very difficult.
key_points: our teacher assigned us（受格省略的關係子句）
省略了which/that，但S + V結構完整
hints: 句型框架：N + (which/that) + S + V O，受格代名詞省略後直接接主詞和動詞
注意：assigned後面要有間接受詞us，表示『指派給我們』

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 媽媽準備的晚餐比我預期的還要豐盛。
translation_exercises.answer: The dinner my mother prepared was more abundant than I expected.
key_points: my mother prepared（受格省略的關係子句）
形容詞比較級搭配句型
hints: 句型框架：N + S + V O + 比較結構，受格代名詞省略不會影響整句邏輯
注意：『比預期』用than I expected另起比較子句，不要混入關係子句

translation_exercises.sentence_chi: 那些社群媒體上傳播的虛假資訊正在誤導許多年輕人。
translation_exercises.answer: The false information social media spreads is misleading many young people.
key_points: social media spreads（受格省略的關係子句）
現在進行式misleading表動作進行中
hints: 句型框架：N + S + V O + is V-ing，省略受格代名詞which/that後主詞social media直接接動詞spreads
注意：不能寫成『social media which spreads』因為which應作主詞而非受詞，此處是省略了『information which』
